reviews.comment:
Es el paso obligado de todo viajero que va por esta ruta hacia la cordillera de Los Andes. Siempre hay combustible y el minimercado tiene de todo para el viajante. Ahora se agrego un restaurante muy lindo y con variedad de comida al plato o para llevar.

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-stop for every traveler heading this way to the Andes Mountains. Fuel is always available, and the mini-market has everything a traveler might need. Now, a very nice restaurant has been added, offering a variety of food, both dine-in and takeout.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBek9pdFh3EAE

reviews.comment:
